name: Hong Kong SAR
note: Massive re-export hub for China; the canonical China-HK mirror gap target in Ferrantino/Liu/Wang (2012) and the GFI methodology.

name: Macao SAR
note: Smaller HK companion; included for completeness.

name: Singapore
note: Asia's primary trans-shipment port; bunker fuel + electronics + petrochemicals.

name: Netherlands
note: Rotterdam — the EU's principal port of entry. Drives the "Rotterdam effect" measured in EU/EDICOM papers.

name: Belgium
note: Antwerp — second EU port; chemicals, diamonds, cars.

name: United Arab Emirates
note: Jebel Ali / Dubai free zone; gold + electronics + general re-exports.

name: Panama
note: Colón Free Zone — Latin America's largest re-export hub.

name: Switzerland
note: Geneva-based commodity trading houses route ~30 % of world oil + metals; appears on the books as Swiss exports.

name: Luxembourg
note: Financial-trade hub; smaller volume but appears as outlier in some EU studies.
